factors.summary: The company faces risks related to product quality and safety, particularly in its defense and aerospace products.

evidence.text: The components, production and use of certain of our products involves hazardous and significant risks. The new Innovation Systems sector designs, manufactures, produces and sells products that involve highly explosive or flammable elements, or otherwise dangerous risks.

factors.summary: The company faces potential tax liabilities related to prior transactions, which could impact its financial position.

evidence.text: If the distribution by Alliant Techsystems Inc. of the shares of Vista Outdoor Inc. did not qualify as a tax-free spin-off under Section 355 of the Internal Revenue Code... then ATK's stockholders immediately prior to the Distribution may be required to pay substantial U.S. federal income taxes and we may be obligated to indemnify Vista for such taxes imposed on Vista.

sentiment.label: negative

Backlog as of June 30, 2018 includes $8.7 billion of Innovation Systems backlog (approximately $500 million of legacy Orbital ATK backlog related to contracts with legacy Northrop Grumman sectors was eliminated in connection with the Merger.)
